key.name: ticker
key.description: NASDAQ ticker to track (e.g. STRC, AAPL, MSFT).

key.name: refresh-interval
key.description: How often to fetch the live price.

key.name: data-source
key.description: Where to pull the price from. Options: yahoo, finnhub, custom.

key.name: custom-url
key.description: When data-source is "custom", this URL is fetched. Response must be JSON with a "price" field.

key.name: finnhub-api-key
key.description: Required when data-source is "finnhub". Get a free key at https://finnhub.io.

key.name: show-change
key.description: Display the dollar change since the previous refresh.

key.name: show-percent
key.description: Display the percentage change since the previous refresh.

key.name: decimal-places
key.description: Number of decimal places to display.

key.name: color-up
key.description: Hex or CSS named color for upward movement.

key.name: color-down
key.description: Hex or CSS named color for downward movement.

key.name: color-neutral
key.description: Hex or CSS named color for no movement.

key.name: text-color
key.description: Base text color when no movement color applies.

key.name: font-size
key.description: Font size relative to the panel (100 = default).

key.name: position
key.description: Where on the top panel to display. Options: left, center, right.

key.name: panel-order
key.description: Sort order within the panel slot (lower = further left/right depending on position).
